title: BLOSTM Steel Wire Brush for Drill - 9 PCS Brass Coated Drill Wire Brush Attachment Set with 1/4" Shank Hex - Metal Wheel Brushes for Cleaning, Rust & Paint Removal, Polishing (9 PCS)
features: BRASS COATED - Powered wire brush set made of brass coated steel wire making them the ideal wire brushes for cleaning, rust removal, or preparing metal surfaces for painting. Each wire brush for paint removal allows you to reach into every nook and cranny effortlessly.

RANGE OF BRUSH SIZES - 9 different wire brushes in total. 2 Round Brushes (50, 75mm) 2 Cup Brushes (50, 75mm) 4 Wire End Brushes (10, 16, 25, 30mm) 1 Precision Cone Brush (16mm). Confidently conquer tight spots, intricate curves, and any challenging task that comes your way. Each metal brush ensures that no corner goes uncleaned and no rust goes untreated.

PRECISION BRUSH SET - Our wire brush for drill set is expertly designed to access even the most stubborn dirt, rust, and paint in the most difficult-to-reach spots. Say goodbye to the frustration of overlooking hidden grime in tight corners, cracks, and crevices of furniture, machinery and other materials.

FITS MOST DRILLS - This brass wire brush drill bit set includes a 1/4" Shank Hex fitting to fit all drills. Additionally, each wire wheel for drill features a robust 0.07" thick alloy steel handle, providing exceptional durability. You can rely on these brushes to perform at their best, even during high-intensity tasks.

LIGHT/MEDIUM DUTY - It is quick and easy to change each drill wire brush attachment. Whether you're dealing with flat, curved, or uneven surfaces, our wire brushes for cleaning adapt effortlessly. Their bristles are engineered not to bend, even after prolonged use, ensuring consistent, reliable performance over time.
description: Product Description Precision Set This set of wire brushes for drills comes with 9 different sizes, designed for accessing hard to reach cracks and corners with ease. Brass Coated Brass coated steel wire making them ideal for cleaning, rust & loose paint removal, preparing metal surfaces for painting among other tasks. Highly Compatible This wire brush drill bit set includes a 1/4" Shank Hex fitting to fit all drills. Complete your drill bit collection with this effortless set. BLOSTM Wire Brush Drill Attachment Set - Steel & Brass Brush Set of 9 This large pack of brass coated crimped steel wire brushes are ready to tackle any light to medium duty surface cleaning or restoration task. The wide selection of brushes will help you achieve your desired result in any task, even hard to reach areas. The 16mm cone brush and the 10mm cup brush are great for nooks and crannies. If you want to cover a large surface, then turn to one of the larger brushes such as the 2 round brushes measuring from 50-75mm or the cup brushes from 10-50mm .
